naomi 2.10.20
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Naomi data model
    • Naomi Model Workflow Example
  • Changelog

    Get plotting metadata for a particular country

    get_plotting_metadata.Rd

    Get plotting metadata for a particular country

    get_plotting_metadata(iso3)

    Arguments

    iso3

    iso3 code of country to get metadata for or blank for default configuration.

    Value

    List of plotting metadata about how to locate data for a specific indicator, data type and plot type. Also returns metadata about colour scheme to use for that country and indicator.

    Examples

    get_plotting_metadata("MWI")
#>                        indicator        data_type  plot_type value_column
#> 1                    art_current        programme choropleth        value
#> 2                    art_current        calibrate   barchart         mean
#> 3                    art_current           output   barchart         mean
#> 4                    art_current       comparison   barchart         mean
#> 5                    art_current           output choropleth         mean
#> 6                    art_adult_f        programme choropleth        value
#> 7                    art_adult_m        programme choropleth        value
#> 8                      art_adult        programme choropleth        value
#> 9                      art_child        programme choropleth        value
#> 10          art_current_adjusted        programme choropleth        value
#> 11          art_adjusted_adult_f        programme choropleth        value
#> 12          art_adjusted_adult_m        programme choropleth        value
#> 13            art_adjusted_adult        programme choropleth        value
#> 14            art_adjusted_child        programme choropleth        value
#> 15           art_adult_sex_ratio        programme choropleth        value
#> 16         art_child_adult_ratio        programme choropleth        value
#> 17                anc_prevalence           output   barchart         mean
#> 18                anc_prevalence              anc choropleth        value
#> 19                anc_prevalence           output choropleth         mean
#> 20              anc_art_coverage              anc choropleth        value
#> 21              anc_art_coverage           output choropleth         mean
#> 22              anc_art_coverage           output   barchart         mean
#> 23                   anc_clients           output   barchart         mean
#> 24                   anc_clients           output choropleth         mean
#> 25                   anc_clients input_comparison   barchart        value
#> 26                   anc_clients              anc choropleth        value
#> 27                    anc_tested input_comparison   barchart        value
#> 28                    anc_tested              anc choropleth        value
#> 29                anc_tested_pos           output choropleth         mean
#> 30                anc_tested_pos           output   barchart         mean
#> 31                anc_tested_pos input_comparison   barchart        value
#> 32                anc_tested_pos              anc choropleth        value
#> 33                 anc_known_pos              anc choropleth        value
#> 34                 anc_known_pos           output   barchart         mean
#> 35                 anc_known_pos           output choropleth         mean
#> 36                 anc_known_pos input_comparison   barchart        value
#> 37                 anc_known_neg              anc choropleth        value
#> 38               anc_already_art           output   barchart         mean
#> 39               anc_already_art           output choropleth         mean
#> 40               anc_already_art input_comparison   barchart        value
#> 41               anc_already_art              anc choropleth        value
#> 42                 anc_total_pos              anc choropleth        value
#> 43                    anc_status              anc choropleth        value
#> 44           anc_art_among_known              anc choropleth        value
#> 45          births_clients_ratio              anc choropleth        value
#> 46               births_facility              anc choropleth        value
#> 47                 art_new_total        programme choropleth        value
#> 48               art_new_adult_f        programme choropleth        value
#> 49               art_new_adult_m        programme choropleth        value
#> 50                 art_new_adult        programme choropleth        value
#> 51                 art_new_child        programme choropleth        value
#> 52         vl_tested_12mos_total        programme choropleth        value
#> 53       vl_tested_12mos_adult_f        programme choropleth        value
#> 54       vl_tested_12mos_adult_m        programme choropleth        value
#> 55         vl_tested_12mos_adult        programme choropleth        value
#> 56         vl_tested_12mos_child        programme choropleth        value
#> 57     vl_suppressed_12mos_total        programme choropleth        value
#> 58   vl_suppressed_12mos_adult_f        programme choropleth        value
#> 59   vl_suppressed_12mos_adult_m        programme choropleth        value
#> 60     vl_suppressed_12mos_adult        programme choropleth        value
#> 61     vl_suppressed_12mos_child        programme choropleth        value
#> 62      vl_prop_suppressed_total        programme choropleth        value
#> 63    vl_prop_suppressed_adult_f        programme choropleth        value
#> 64    vl_prop_suppressed_adult_m        programme choropleth        value
#> 65      vl_prop_suppressed_adult        programme choropleth        value
#> 66      vl_prop_suppressed_child        programme choropleth        value
#> 67             vl_coverage_total        programme choropleth        value
#> 68           vl_coverage_adult_f        programme choropleth        value
#> 69           vl_coverage_adult_m        programme choropleth        value
#> 70             vl_coverage_adult        programme choropleth        value
#> 71             vl_coverage_child        programme choropleth        value
#> 72                    prevalence           output   barchart         mean
#> 73                    prevalence           survey choropleth     estimate
#> 74                    prevalence        calibrate   barchart         mean
#> 75                    prevalence           output choropleth         mean
#> 76                    prevalence       comparison   barchart         mean
#> 77                  art_coverage           survey choropleth     estimate
#> 78                  art_coverage           output   barchart         mean
#> 79                  art_coverage        calibrate   barchart         mean
#> 80                  art_coverage       comparison   barchart         mean
#> 81                  art_coverage           output choropleth         mean
#> 82               recent_infected           survey choropleth     estimate
#> 83       viral_suppression_plhiv           survey choropleth     estimate
#> 84         art_current_residents           output choropleth         mean
#> 85         art_current_residents           output   barchart         mean
#> 86                    population        calibrate   barchart         mean
#> 87                    population       population    pyramid   population
#> 88                    population           output choropleth         mean
#> 89                    population           output   barchart         mean
#> 90                         plhiv           output choropleth         mean
#> 91                         plhiv           output   barchart         mean
#> 92                         plhiv        calibrate   barchart         mean
#> 93                     incidence           output choropleth         mean
#> 94                     incidence        calibrate   barchart         mean
#> 95                     incidence           output   barchart         mean
#> 96                    infections           output choropleth         mean
#> 97                    infections           output   barchart         mean
#> 98                    infections        calibrate   barchart         mean
#> 99              aware_plhiv_prop           output choropleth         mean
#> 100             aware_plhiv_prop           output   barchart         mean
#> 101             aware_plhiv_prop        calibrate   barchart         mean
#> 102            unaware_plhiv_num        calibrate   barchart         mean
#> 103            unaware_plhiv_num           output choropleth         mean
#> 104            unaware_plhiv_num           output   barchart         mean
#> 105              aware_plhiv_num           output choropleth         mean
#> 106              aware_plhiv_num           output   barchart         mean
#> 107          untreated_plhiv_num           output   barchart         mean
#> 108          untreated_plhiv_num           output choropleth         mean
#> 109                 plhiv_attend           output   barchart         mean
#> 110                 plhiv_attend           output choropleth         mean
#> 111       untreated_plhiv_attend           output choropleth         mean
#> 112       untreated_plhiv_attend           output   barchart         mean
#> 113           aware_plhiv_attend           output choropleth         mean
#> 114           aware_plhiv_attend           output   barchart         mean
#> 115         unaware_plhiv_attend           output choropleth         mean
#> 116         unaware_plhiv_attend           output   barchart         mean
#> 117                    anc_plhiv           output choropleth         mean
#> 118                    anc_plhiv           output   barchart         mean
#> 119                  anc_art_new           output choropleth         mean
#> 120                  anc_art_new           output   barchart         mean
#> 121               anc_tested_neg           output choropleth         mean
#> 122               anc_tested_neg           output   barchart         mean
#> 123             population_ratio        calibrate   barchart         mean
#> 124                  plhiv_ratio        calibrate   barchart         mean
#> 125             infections_ratio        calibrate   barchart         mean
#> 126            art_current_ratio        calibrate   barchart         mean
#> 127      unaware_plhiv_num_ratio        calibrate   barchart         mean
#> 128             prevalence_ratio        calibrate   barchart         mean
#> 129           art_coverage_ratio        calibrate   barchart         mean
#> 130       aware_plhiv_prop_ratio        calibrate   barchart         mean
#> 131              incidence_ratio        calibrate   barchart         mean
#> 132   anc_prevalence_age_matched       comparison   barchart         mean
#> 133 anc_art_coverage_age_matched       comparison   barchart         mean
#> 134                number_on_art input_comparison   barchart        value
#> 135        population_proportion       population    pyramid   population
#>     error_low_column error_high_column indicator_column
#> 1                                                  plot
#> 2              lower             upper        indicator
#> 3              lower             upper        indicator

#>                  indicator_value                                  name scale
#> 1                    art_current                ART number (attending)     1
#> 2                    art_current                ART number (attending)     1
#> 3                    art_current                ART number (attending)     1
#> 4                    art_current                ART number (attending)     1
#> 5                    art_current                ART number (attending)     1
#> 6                    art_adult_f                            ART female     1
#> 7                    art_adult_m                              ART male     1
#> 8                      art_adult                             ART adult     1
#> 9                      art_child                        ART paediatric     1
#> 10          art_current_adjusted       ART number (residents) adjusted     1
#> 11          art_adjusted_adult_f                   ART female adjusted     1
#> 12          art_adjusted_adult_m                     ART male adjusted     1
#> 13            art_adjusted_adult                    ART adult adjusted     1
#> 14            art_adjusted_child               ART paediatric adjusted     1
#> 15           art_adult_sex_ratio                   ART adult sex ratio     1
#> 16         art_child_adult_ratio              ART child-to-adult ratio     1
#> 17                anc_prevalence                    ANC HIV prevalence     1
#> 18                anc_prevalence                    ANC HIV prevalence     1
#> 19                anc_prevalence                    ANC HIV prevalence     1
#> 20              anc_art_coverage                ANC prior ART coverage     1
#> 21              anc_art_coverage                ANC prior ART coverage     1
#> 22              anc_art_coverage                ANC prior ART coverage     1
#> 23                   anc_clients                           ANC clients     1
#> 24                   anc_clients                           ANC clients     1
#> 25                   anc_clients                           ANC clients     1
#> 26                   anc_clients                           ANC clients     1
#> 27                    anc_tested                            ANC tested     1
#> 28                    anc_tested                            ANC tested     1
#> 29                anc_tested_pos                   ANC tested positive     1
#> 30                anc_tested_pos                   ANC tested positive     1
#> 31                anc_tested_pos                   ANC tested positive     1
#> 32                anc_tested_pos                   ANC tested positive     1
#> 33                 anc_known_pos                    ANC known positive     1
#> 34                 anc_known_pos                    ANC known positive     1
#> 35                 anc_known_pos                    ANC known positive     1
#> 36                 anc_known_pos                    ANC known positive     1
#> 37                 anc_known_neg                    ANC known negative     1
#> 38               anc_already_art          ANC attendees already on ART     1
#> 39               anc_already_art          ANC attendees already on ART     1
#> 40               anc_already_art          ANC attendees already on ART     1
#> 41               anc_already_art          ANC attendees already on ART     1
#> 42                 anc_total_pos                ANC total HIV positive     1
#> 43                    anc_status            ANC HIV status ascertained     1
#> 44           anc_art_among_known ANC ART coverage among known positive     1
#> 45          births_clients_ratio                  Births-clients ratio     1
#> 46               births_facility                Health facility births     1
#> 47                 art_new_total                               ART new     1
#> 48               art_new_adult_f                        ART new female     1
#> 49               art_new_adult_m                          ART new male     1
#> 50                 art_new_adult                         ART new adult     1
#> 51                 art_new_child                    ART new paediatric     1
#> 52         vl_tested_12mos_total                             VL tested     1
#> 53       vl_tested_12mos_adult_f                      VL tested female     1
#> 54       vl_tested_12mos_adult_m                        VL tested male     1
#> 55         vl_tested_12mos_adult                       VL tested adult     1
#> 56         vl_tested_12mos_child                  VL tested paediatric     1
#> 57     vl_suppressed_12mos_total                   VL tests suppressed     1
#> 58   vl_suppressed_12mos_adult_f            VL tests suppressed female     1
#> 59   vl_suppressed_12mos_adult_m              VL tests suppressed male     1
#> 60     vl_suppressed_12mos_adult             VL tests suppressed adult     1
#> 61     vl_suppressed_12mos_child        VL tests suppressed paediatric     1
#> 62      vl_prop_suppressed_total                Viral load suppression     1
#> 63    vl_prop_suppressed_adult_f         Viral load suppression female     1
#> 64    vl_prop_suppressed_adult_m           Viral load suppression male     1
#> 65      vl_prop_suppressed_adult          Viral load suppression adult     1
#> 66      vl_prop_suppressed_child     Viral load suppression paediatric     1
#> 67             vl_coverage_total                   VL testing coverage     1
#> 68           vl_coverage_adult_f            VL testing coverage female     1
#> 69           vl_coverage_adult_m              VL testing coverage male     1
#> 70             vl_coverage_adult             VL testing coverage adult     1
#> 71             vl_coverage_child        VL testing coverage paediatric     1
#> 72                    prevalence                        HIV prevalence     1
#> 73                    prevalence                        HIV prevalence     1
#> 74                    prevalence                        HIV prevalence     1
#> 75                    prevalence                        HIV prevalence     1
#> 76                    prevalence                        HIV prevalence     1
#> 77                  art_coverage                          ART coverage     1
#> 78                  art_coverage                          ART coverage     1
#> 79                  art_coverage                          ART coverage     1
#> 80                  art_coverage                          ART coverage     1
#> 81                  art_coverage                          ART coverage     1
#> 82               recent_infected          Proportion recently infected     1
#> 83       viral_suppression_plhiv                Viral load suppression     1
#> 84         art_current_residents                ART number (residents)     1
#> 85         art_current_residents                ART number (residents)     1
#> 86                    population                            Population     1
#> 87                    population                            Population     1
#> 88                    population                            Population     1
#> 89                    population                            Population     1
#> 90                         plhiv                                 PLHIV     1
#> 91                         plhiv                                 PLHIV     1
#> 92                         plhiv                                 PLHIV     1
#> 93                     incidence                         HIV incidence  1000
#> 94                     incidence                         HIV incidence  1000
#> 95                     incidence                         HIV incidence  1000
#> 96                    infections                        New infections     1
#> 97                    infections                        New infections     1
#> 98                    infections                        New infections     1
#> 99              aware_plhiv_prop                Proportion PLHIV aware     1
#> 100             aware_plhiv_prop                Proportion PLHIV aware     1
#> 101             aware_plhiv_prop                Proportion PLHIV aware     1
#> 102            unaware_plhiv_num                  Number PLHIV unaware     1
#> 103            unaware_plhiv_num                  Number PLHIV unaware     1
#> 104            unaware_plhiv_num                  Number PLHIV unaware     1
#> 105              aware_plhiv_num                    Number PLHIV aware     1
#> 106              aware_plhiv_num                    Number PLHIV aware     1
#> 107          untreated_plhiv_num                      PLHIV not on ART     1
#> 108          untreated_plhiv_num                      PLHIV not on ART     1
#> 109                 plhiv_attend                 PLHIV (ART catchment)     1
#> 110                 plhiv_attend                 PLHIV (ART catchment)     1
#> 111       untreated_plhiv_attend       Untreated PLHIV (ART catchment)     1
#> 112       untreated_plhiv_attend       Untreated PLHIV (ART catchment)     1
#> 113           aware_plhiv_attend    Number Aware PLHIV (ART catchment)     1
#> 114           aware_plhiv_attend    Number Aware PLHIV (ART catchment)     1
#> 115         unaware_plhiv_attend  Number unaware PLHIV (ART catchment)     1
#> 116         unaware_plhiv_attend  Number unaware PLHIV (ART catchment)     1
#> 117                    anc_plhiv            HIV positive ANC attendees     1
#> 118                    anc_plhiv            HIV positive ANC attendees     1
#> 119                  anc_art_new                ART initiations at ANC     1
#> 120                  anc_art_new                ART initiations at ANC     1
#> 121               anc_tested_neg                   ANC tested negative     1
#> 122               anc_tested_neg                   ANC tested negative     1
#> 123             population_ratio                      Population ratio     1
#> 124                  plhiv_ratio                           PLHIV ratio     1
#> 125             infections_ratio                  New infections ratio     1
#> 126            art_current_ratio          ART number (attending) ratio     1
#> 127      unaware_plhiv_num_ratio            Number PLHIV unaware ratio     1
#> 128             prevalence_ratio                  HIV prevalence ratio     1
#> 129           art_coverage_ratio                    ART coverage ratio     1
#> 130       aware_plhiv_prop_ratio          Proportion PLHIV aware ratio     1
#> 131              incidence_ratio                       Incidence ratio     1
#> 132   anc_prevalence_age_matched            ANC prevalence age matched     1
#> 133 anc_art_coverage_age_matched          ANC ART coverage age matched     1
#> 134                number_on_art                         Number on ART     1
#> 135        population_proportion                 Population proportion     1
#>     accuracy format indicator_sort_order    iso3             colour min     max
#> 1         NA  "0,0"                    1     MWI  interpolateGreens   0 8.0e+04
#> 2        100    0,0                    6     MWI  interpolateGreens   0 8.0e+04
#> 3        100    0,0                    6     MWI  interpolateGreens   0 8.0e+04
#> 4        100    0,0                    6     MWI  interpolateGreens   0 8.0e+04
#> 5        100    0,0                    6     MWI  interpolateGreens   0 8.0e+04
#> 6         NA  "0,0"                    2 default  interpolateGreens   0 8.0e+04
#> 7         NA  "0,0"                    3 default  interpolateGreens   0 8.0e+04
#> 8         NA  "0,0"                    4 default  interpolateGreens   0 8.0e+04
#> 9         NA  "0,0"                    5 default  interpolateGreens   0 8.0e+04
#> 10        NA  "0,0"                    6 default  interpolateGreens   0 8.0e+04
#> 11        NA  "0,0"                    7 default  interpolateGreens   0 8.0e+04
#> 12        NA  "0,0"                    8 default  interpolateGreens   0 8.0e+04
#> 13        NA  "0,0"                    9 default  interpolateGreens   0 8.0e+04
#> 14        NA  "0,0"                   10 default  interpolateGreens   0 8.0e+04
#> 15        NA   "0%"                   11 default  interpolateGreens   0 1.2e+00
#> 16        NA   "0%"                   12 default  interpolateGreens   0 1.2e+00
#> 17        NA   0.0%                   18     MWI interpolateOranges   0 5.0e-01
#> 18        NA "0.0%"                   13     MWI interpolateOranges   0 5.0e-01
#> 19        NA   0.0%                   18     MWI interpolateOranges   0 5.0e-01
#> 20        NA   "0%"                   14     MWI interpolateOranges   0 1.0e+00
#> 21        NA   0.0%                   19     MWI interpolateOranges   0 1.0e+00
#> 22        NA   0.0%                   19     MWI interpolateOranges   0 1.0e+00
#> 23       100    0,0                   20 default interpolateOranges   0 7.0e+05
#> 24       100    0,0                   20 default interpolateOranges   0 7.0e+05
#> 25         1    0,0                   20 default interpolateOranges   0 7.0e+05
#> 26        NA  "0,0"                   15 default interpolateOranges   0 7.0e+05
#> 27         1    0,0                   25 default interpolateOranges   0 1.0e+06
#> 28        NA  "0,0"                   16 default interpolateOranges   0 1.0e+06
#> 29        10    0,0                   26 default interpolateOranges   0 3.5e+05
#> 30        10    0,0                   26 default interpolateOranges   0 3.5e+05
#> 31         1    0,0                   26 default interpolateOranges   0 3.5e+05
#> 32        NA  "0,0"                   17 default interpolateOranges   0 3.5e+05
#> 33        NA  "0,0"                   18 default interpolateOranges   0 3.5e+05
#> 34        10    0,0                   24 default interpolateOranges   0 3.5e+05
#> 35        10    0,0                   24 default interpolateOranges   0 3.5e+05
#> 36         1    0,0                   24 default interpolateOranges   0 3.5e+05
#> 37        NA  "0,0"                   19 default interpolateOranges   0 7.0e+05
#> 38        10    0,0                   22 default interpolateOranges   0 3.5e+05
#> 39        10    0,0                   22 default interpolateOranges   0 3.5e+05
#> 40         1    0,0                   22 default interpolateOranges   0 3.5e+05
#> 41        NA  "0,0"                   20 default interpolateOranges   0 3.5e+05
#> 42        NA  "0,0"                   21 default interpolateOranges   0 3.5e+05
#> 43        NA  "0,0"                   22 default interpolateOranges   0 3.5e+05
#> 44        NA   "0%"                   23 default interpolateOranges   0 3.5e+05
#> 45        NA   "0%"                   24 default   interpolateGreys   0 1.2e+00
#> 46        NA  "0,0"                   25 default   interpolateGreys   0 3.5e+05
#> 47        NA  "0,0"                   26 default  interpolateGreens   0 8.0e+04
